category_sources: Official libcoap reference describes libcoap as a C implementation of CoAP for constrained devices.
source_facts.description says it is a lightweight application protocol for resource-constrained devices.
display_name_sources: Official homepage/repository uses the project name libcoap.
docs_sources: Official libcoap documentation page provides quick start and API reference links.
Official reference page is the coap(7) overview for libcoap.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/obgm/libcoap; per instruction repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official libcoap reference describes CoAP, constrained devices, and example executables.
source_facts.description and executables identify a CoAP library with command-line tools.
